# AP0110.ORG

> AP0110 is a California-based AI infrastructure company devoted to building tech that makes the world a better place to live.

## About

AP0110.ORG is documenting Web 4 (Independent Internet) in real time, and developing the open standards for an internet that works for everyone.


## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://ap0110.org/): AP0110 mission overview, programs, and Web 4.0 technology
- [CalCompute](https://ap0110.org/calcompute): California's public AI cloud computing cluster established by Senate Bill 53 (SB-53) — safe, ethical, equitable, and sustainable AI for public institutions
- [Articles](https://ap0110.org/articles): Research and editorial articles
- [Documentation](https://ap0110.org/docs): Technical documentation 

## Key Projects

### Web 4.0 / Independent Internet

- Official Website: https://AP0110.ORG
- Independent Internet describes an internet of self-hosting, p2p communication, and mesh-networking, and artificail intelligence.

### Life Impact International

- Website: https://lifeimpactintl.org
- Description: US 501(c)3 operating orphanages in Thailand Myanmar/Burma and Brail, and organizing anti-human-trafficking efforts around the world.
- Relationship: AP0110 is partnered with Life Impact International to support anti-human-trafficking efforts with secure cloud and cutting-edge and web 4.0 technologies.

### CalCompute

- Website: https://CaliforniaCompute.org
- Official Partners: CA GovOps, UC Berkeley, UC Riverside, AP0110.ORG, Economic Security Project of California.
- Description: California is building digital public infrastructure in the form of CalCompute, a public AI cloud cluster owned and operated by the Universities of California, and made available to California's public sector and public-benefit projects.
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/calcompute/
- Email: [team@CaliforniaCompute.org](mailto:team@CaliforniaCompute.org)
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/calcompute/
- X / Twitter: https://x.com/CalCompute
- GitHub: https://github.com/CalCompute
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@CalCompute
- Medium: https://medium.com/@CalCompute
- Substack: https://substack.com/@calcompute
- BlueSky: https://bsky.app/profile/calcompute.bsky.social
- Mastodon: https://mastodon.social/@CalCompute
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/calcompute/
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@calcompute
- Reddit: https://www.reddit.com/user/CalCompute/
